summary: The code correctly implements the FreshBooks API integration, including service creation, controller updates, and route setup. All required files are present and function as specified.

criteria.name: Completeness
criteria.description: Check all files listed in the instructions are present in the result.
criteria.details: All required files (freshBooksApi.js, financeController.js, financeRoutes.js, env.example) are present.

criteria.name: Correctness
criteria.description: Verify each function/class does what the instructions specify.
criteria.details: The FreshBooksApi service correctly authenticates and fetches invoice data. The getInvoices function in financeController.js returns invoice data in JSON format. The /invoices endpoint in financeRoutes.js is accessible and returns the correct data.

criteria.name: Quality
criteria.description: Check for proper types and error handling.
criteria.details: The code includes proper error handling and validation for environment variables. The service logs errors and provides a generic error message for clients.

criteria.name: Safety
criteria.description: Check for forbidden paths, path traversal, or hardcoded secrets.
criteria.details: No forbidden paths or hardcoded secrets were detected. Environment variables are used for sensitive information.
